title: sloanea guapilensis
intro: Sloanea guapilensis, also known as the Guapile Sloanea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erysaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The extracts from Sloanea guapilensis have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits can be utilized through herbal preparations such as tea infusions, decoctions, and infusions of its leaves, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
